name: Full Consensus Contra with Momentum Filter
hypothesis: The powerful 'full consensus' formula, which combines BBO pressure, deep book pressure, and ask wall size, is a strong predictor of price drops. By adding a filter to only take trades when recent price momentum is also negative, we can screen out trades fighting a strong local uptrend, increasing win rate.
mutation_note: Revisits the high-performing 'full consensus' spec family. Instead of a volatility filter, this version adds a momentum filter, requiring the signal to align with the recent price trend to avoid trading against strong short-term momentum.
